values.installSyncML:
<Replace>
  <CmdID>1</CmdID>
  <Item>
    <Target>
      <LocURI>./Device/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Config/Printers/ConfigureRpcConnectionPolicy</LocURI>
    </Target>
    <Meta>
      <Format xmlns="syncml:metinf">chr</Format>
      <Type xmlns="syncml:metinf">text/plain</Type>
    </Meta>
    <Data><![CDATA[<enabled/><data id="RpcConnectionProtocol_Enum" value="0"/><data id="RpcConnectionAuthentication_Enum" value="0"/>]]></Data>
  </Item>
</Replace>
values.name: ConfigureRpcConnectionPolicy

values.installSyncML:
<Replace>
  <CmdID>1</CmdID>
  <Item>
    <Target>
      <LocURI>./Device/Vendor/MSFT/Policy/Config/Printers/ConfigureRpcListenerPolicy</LocURI>
    </Target>
    <Meta>
      <Format xmlns="syncml:metinf">chr</Format>
      <Type xmlns="syncml:metinf">text/plain</Type>
    </Meta>
    <Data><![CDATA[<enabled/><data id="RpcListenerProtocols_Enum" value="5"/><data id="RpcAuthenticationProtocol_Enum" value="0"/>]]></Data>
  </Item>
</Replace>
values.name: ConfigureRpcListenerPolicy
